shows.description: Destiny intervenes when a kungfu baby rescues a poisoned CEO never knowing she’s his child with Cinderella.

shows.name: DaDaji Ka Online Romance

shows.name: Superbhai
shows.description: A betrayed young man gains a supernatural lottery system, powerful divine sisters, and rises to crush enemies seeking revenge and redemption.

shows.name: Pati ही Parmeshwar

shows.description: A powerful CEO falls for a wronged waitress, sparking love, revenge, and redemption amid betrayal, secrets, and family conspiracies.

shows.description: Reincarnated delivery boy regains cosmic powers to reclaim throne, defeat betrayal, and challenge gods across three realms.

shows.description: A modern man time-travels to ancient India, using future cooking skills to rise from poverty to power.

shows.name: Brother's Regret
shows.description: After being discarded as a “stand-in” when the family’s biological daughter returns, a heartbroken orphan volunteers for a 30-year sleep experiment and donates her corneas—only for her regretful family to realize the truth too late, as she awakens with no memory of them.

shows.name: Moving Ahead
shows.description: After being dumped as a “clingy loser,” a heartbroken William reinvents himself and rescues mysterious heiress Olivia—sparking jealousy in his ex Emily, who soon learns that crossing Olivia comes with dangerous consequences.

shows.name: Dangerous Vijay
shows.description: A wronged man gains mystical power to destroy corrupt elites and reclaim justice, family, and honor.

shows.name: Biwi ka Hatyara
shows.description: A heartbroken cop investigates brutal murder, unaware victim is his pregnant wife’s ghost.

shows.name: Yamlok Express
shows.description: Poor Ronak dies accidentally, bribes Yamlok, returns alive rich, exposes betrayal, fights destiny and love.

shows.name: Pyaar Ka X-Ray
shows.description: A struggling taxi driver gains mysterious x-ray vision powers, entering a dangerous world of antiques, secrets, curses, and destiny.

shows.name: Secret Surgeon
shows.description: A genius surgeon disguises himself as a hospital cleaner to expose corruption and save lives with extraordinary medical skill.

shows.name: Unspoken Desire
shows.description:
"Emily regrets the one-night stand with the man she had secretly loved for eight years, letting him pay her.
Michael is intimate at night, a stranger by day. When it's time to arrange a marriage, he takes her home instead.
After family drama and an injury, he sends her away but keeps saving her."

shows.name: Mystic Bond
shows.description: Harper Lee awakens Piercing Eye by accident. His master reveals his arranged fiancée holds a matching jade for sainthood. Saving her from danger, she calls him a pervert. He smirks, "Let me prove my abilities to you!" Watch how he navigates the city!

shows.name: Banquet of Revenge
shows.description: Mason Miller, a Level 8 warrior, honors a marriage pact but faces the Walker family's scorn. They force the critically ill Sophia Walker to wed him instead of the favored Charlotte Walker. Humiliated at the banquet, Mason unleashes his power, shocking all. He protects Sophia and crushes his mockers.

shows.name: Mr. X
shows.description: A beggar with hidden divine healing powers saves a billionaire’s dying daughter, exposing his true identity and destiny.

shows.name: Gumshuda
shows.description: A jealous husband, missing wife, and hidden crime unravel dark secrets, obsession, and deadly truth.

shows.name: Boss Baby
shows.description: A mystical immortal reborn as a baby protects his parents, battling dark forces, power struggles, and destiny.

shows.name: Pyaar ya Vyapaar ?
shows.description: A forced marriage turns into unexpected love as hidden pasts, secrets, and rival lovers threaten their fragile relationship.

shows.name: Secret Shaadi
shows.description: A poor girl marries a cold CEO for her father’s treatment, hiding identity as love slowly blossoms.

shows.name: Tum Tak
shows.description: A mysterious girl’s hidden past, love, betrayal, and a life-saving secret that changes everyone’s destiny forever.

shows.name: Servant of Desire
shows.description: Emma, desperate to pay her brother's hospital bills, is drawn into the orbit of Ethan. By chance, she becomes the Walker family's maid. As fate turns, the eldest son Ethan shows ambiguous affection toward her and wants her as his personal maid, while the second son also confesses his love.

shows.name: Bewafa Kaun?
shows.description: After signing divorce papers, Priya rebuilds her life while arrogant CEO Rohit realizes his love too late.

shows.name: Ek Raat Do Baarat
shows.description: After one dangerous night, runaway Siya’s pregnancy forces soldier Veer into a duty-bound marriage that slowly becomes love.

shows.name: Project MEERA
shows.description: Neglected by her family, Meera enters a thirty-year sleep experiment, leaving them to face devastating regret.

shows.name: Market Ka Raja
shows.description: A disguised billionaire protects his son, destroys arrogant enemies, and helps a betrayed entrepreneur reclaim her power.
